title: (Bullish Signal) AMSC, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Dec 14, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that AMSC's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 89 similar cases where AMSC's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 82 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $21.77 is above $17.10 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 11/11/20 - 12/14/20, the price experienced a +45% Uptrend. During the week of 12/07/20 - 12/14/20, the stock enjoyed a +8% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/q53phq7whe561.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=5d6c9eac0cae7989809eb5b79c852faf82950696

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for AMSC just turned positive on November 17, 2020. Looking at past instances where AMSC's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 41 of 48 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

AMSC moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 16, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for AMSC crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 23, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 14 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

Following a +5.77% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where AMSC advanced for three days, in 245 of 295 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 186 of 200 cases where AMSC Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 90%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8289394-american-superconductor-amsc-20-21-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-dec-14-2020?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
